name: Whitesburg Rectangular Dining Room Table Wood/Brown/Cottage White - Signature Design by Ashley: Non-Extension, Seats 6
description: Incorporate cottage-cool warmth in your dining space with the Whitesburg dining room table. A two-tone finish serves up twice the charm and character. Made with select veneers and hardwood solids in a two-tone finish. Table is finished in a burnished brown color. The table base is finished in cottage white paint. Signature Design by Ashley is a registered trademark of Ashley Furniture Industries, Inc.
